context: Tests whether Focus Engine guidance handles tvOS directional focus, reachability, SwiftUI focus sections, UIKit focus guides, and debugging without replacing the system focus engine.

checklist.name: Reachable actions
checklist.description: States that tvOS actions must be reachable through focus movement and select or activation, not touch-only gestures.

checklist.name: System focus engine
checklist.description: Explains that the focus engine controls directional movement and should not be replaced with manual swipe routing for normal UI navigation.

checklist.name: Interactive card semantics
checklist.description: Recommends semantic Button controls or explicit focusable custom controls for interactive cards.

checklist.name: SwiftUI before UIKit guides
checklist.description: Recommends focusSection() for uneven SwiftUI sidebar and grid regions before reaching for UIKit UIFocusGuide.

checklist.name: Guide and debugger scope
checklist.description: Uses UIFocusGuide only for UIKit or custom geometry gaps and mentions UIFocusDebugger as an LLDB debugging aid.
